description.zh: 必须遵守的规则、边界或限制。
description.en: Rule, boundary, or limitation that must be followed.

description.zh: 从 Markdown/TXT/PDF/DOCX 文档导入的章节候选知识。
description.en: Candidate knowledge imported from a document section.

description.zh: 从项目文件中提取的项目级摘要。
description.en: Project-level summary extracted from project files.

description.zh: 从源码或目录结构中提取的模块职责映射。
description.en: Module responsibility map extracted from source or directory structure.

description.zh: 故事世界的规则、历史、地理、社会结构或超自然体系。
description.en: Rules, history, geography, society, or systems of a story world.

description.zh: 角色身份、动机、关系、口吻和限制。
description.en: Character identity, motivation, relationships, voice, and constraints.

description.zh: 故事发生顺序、历史节点或章节内关键事件。
description.en: Chronological story event, historical point, or chapter event.

description.zh: 章节、场景或剧情推进节点。
description.en: Chapter, scene, or plot progression beat.

description.zh: 基于已批准知识生成或整理的章节草稿。
description.en: Chapter draft generated or organized from approved knowledge.

description.zh: 伏笔、线索、回收计划和悬念管理。
description.en: Foreshadowing, clues, payoff plans, and suspense tracking.

description.zh: 从章节草稿中反向提取的候选设定或事实。
description.en: Candidate facts or settings extracted from a chapter draft.
